titleStmt.title: SII 33.155: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 155. (A.R. No. B 259 of 1950.) Turimella, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Pāpavināśēśvara temple.

Damaged. Registers the gift of the village Vimjyanamupāḍu in Vinikoṇḍa-dēśam to the god Pāpavināśanadēva at Anu (?) for conducting aṁgaraṁgabhōga in Ēṟuva-sīma by the king for the health and prosperity of his father Harihararāya and himself. A post-script dated Vibhava, Kārttika śu. 10, Sunday, records the sale of half of his share by Surabha-Jiya, son of Guruga-Jiya to Nāra-Jiya (son of Pāpa-Jiya).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayā
Agunēṁṭi su
15 sō svasti śrī ma
ya vibāḷa bāsetē nū
ru rāyaragaṁḍḍa pūrvvapaści dakṣiṇa catu
samudrādhīśvaruṁḍaina śrīvīraharihararāya
ni kumāruṁḍu śrī vīrabukarāya Oḍayelu
vijayanagaramu nijarājyādhānigānu sarvvaja
nānurāguṁḍai pṛthvīrājyamu cēyucuṁnnu
tama taṁḍri Arihararāyakiṁ tamaku
nu rājyabhivridhi Avunaṭugānu Āyu
rārogyaśvariyābhivridhi Avunaṭugānu
dhanakanakavastuvāhanasamṛdhi Avu
naṭugānunnu yeṟuva dēśamulōnu Anu
lō pāpavināśana dēvarakunu Aṁggaraṁgga
bogālakuṁnnu Aṣṭabhōgatēja svāmyamugā
nu vinikoṁḍa dēśamulōnu viṁjyanamu
pāḍu dhārāpūrvvakamu cēsi Ācaṁ
drārkkasthāyigānu yiccenu maṁggaḷa
mahā śrī śrī śrī svadattā dviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārē
ṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavet . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁddharā . ṣaṣṭirvva
ruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
vibhava saṁvatsara kārttika su 10 Ā pāpajiyya
la nārajiyyalaku gurugajiyyala koḍku su
rubhajiyyala sthānamaṁddu tana pā
lu sagamu krayamugānu Ammenu ma
ṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
